Risk_Description: Reporter email or contact info may be visible in public item list
Mitigation_Action: Show only item category and status publicly; restrict contact details to admin view

Risk_Description: Unauthenticated users may change item status in prototype demo
Mitigation_Action: Separate admin dashboard and simulate role-based authorization check in localStorage

Risk_Description: Third-party icons or font assets used without clear licensing records
Mitigation_Action: Establish third-party asset register and verify open-source licenses

Risk_Description: Prototype landing page messaging may imply guaranteed item recovery rate
Mitigation_Action: Rephrase messaging to emphasize centralized search/reporting rather than guaranteed recovery

Risk_Description: Duplicate item reports for the same lost item may confuse users and staff
Mitigation_Action: Add category/location filters and allow admin users to merge or flag duplicate entries

Risk_Description: Uploaded item photos may accidentally reveal student faces or background personal info
Mitigation_Action: Provide photo upload guidelines (item-only closeups) and sanitize sample demo images

Risk_Description: High search time leading students to abandon search within 24 hours if location is too vague
Mitigation_Action: Include specific campus building dropdowns and visual status badges to accelerate search
